apod_title: The Corona Australis Molecular Cloud and the Chandelier Cluster
label: namecode - NEBULA | 430 ly
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by The Corona Australis Molecular Cloud and the Chandelier Cluster. The Southern Crown (Corona Australis) dazzles with young and ancient celestial jewels. The Corona Australis Cloud is a collage of reflection and emission nebulae on the left of today’s image. At 430 Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
